playbook.emptyHint: Select or drag a playbook here to start.

introductions.title: Introductions
introductions.preamble: Wait here for everyone else. When everyone's ready, take turns introducing your characters. When someone reveals something and you want to know more, ask them about it. When someone asks you a question, answer it truthfully.
introductions.step1: On your first turn, introduce yourself by name, pronouns, background, origin, and appearance.
introductions.step2: On your second turn, describe your special possessions and how you contribute to the village (beyond working the fields).
introductions.step4Preamble: On your next turn, answer one of the following, naming one or more NPCs who live in Stonetop.
introductions.step5: Go around again. Answer another question from 4, or pass. When everyone has passed, go on.
introductions.step6Preamble: On your next turn, ask your fellow PCs one of these. When others ask you, answer as you like.
introductions.step7: Go around again. Ask another question from 6, or pass. When everyone has passed, go on.
introductions.step8: Add your home to the steading playbook. When everyone is done, let spring break forth!

followers.empty: Drag followers here from the Followers compendium.

arcana.empty: Drag arcana here from the Arcana compendium.

inventory.regularItemsNote: Use supplies to Recover, Make Camp, or have extra small items.
inventory.smallItemsNote:
Fit in a pocket, pouch, or boot.

When you Outfit, mark □ below equal to 4+Prosperity.
inventory.regularUndefinedPoolNote: When you Have What You Need, move ◆ from here to ◇ below.
inventory.smallUndefinedPoolNote: When you Have What You Need, move ◆ from here to items below, or expend supplies to mark an additional ◇.

outfit.heading: When you Outfit, mark a number of ◇ below on specific items or as a group.
outfit.light: For a light load (quick & quiet), mark up to 3 ◆
outfit.heavy: For a heavy load (noisy, slow, hot, quick to tire), mark 7–9 ◆

hideRollMode.name: Hide Roll Mode
hideRollMode.hint: Hide the roll mode selector (advantage/disadvantage) from character sheets.

debugMode.name: Debug Mode
debugMode.hint: Enable debug logging in the browser console.

expandMoveDescriptions.name: Expand Move Descriptions
expandMoveDescriptions.hint: Show move descriptions expanded by default on character sheets.

defaultSheetTab.name: Default Sheet Tab
defaultSheetTab.hint: Which tab the character sheet opens to by default.

moves.pickInstruction: Pick up to {count} moves to start with.

appearance.label: Appearance
appearance.instruction: Choose 1 on each line, or make something up:

origin.label: Origin
origin.instruction: Stonetop is your home, or close enough, but where are you (or your family) from originally? Pick 1 and a name to match (or make up something similar).
